allow: Bash(python -c " import sys sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\) from flask import Flask, jsonify from flask_socketio import SocketIO import generate_cert, config app = Flask\(__name__\) socketio = SocketIO\(app, cors_allowed_origins='*', async_mode='threading'\) @app.route\('/test'\) def test\(\): return jsonify\({'ok': True}\) generate_cert.generate\(\) import threading, time, ssl, urllib.request def run\(\): socketio.run\(app, host='127.0.0.1', port=8444, ssl_context=\(config.CERT_FILE, config.KEY_FILE\), use_reloader=False, log_output=False\) t = threading.Thread\(target=run, daemon=True\) t.start\(\) time.sleep\(3\) ctx = ssl.create_default_context\(\) ctx.check_hostname = False ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE try: r = urllib.request.urlopen\('https://127.0.0.1:8444/test', context=ctx\) print\('status:', r.status, r.read\(\)\) except Exception as e: print\('error:', e\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, threading, time, ssl, urllib.request sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\) import server def run\(\): server.socketio.run\(server.app, host='127.0.0.1', port=8444, ssl_context=\('certs/cert.pem','certs/key.pem'\), use_reloader=False, log_output=False\) t = threading.Thread\(target=run, daemon=True\) t.start\(\) time.sleep\(4\) ctx = ssl.create_default_context\(\) ctx.check_hostname = False ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE for path in ['/api/server-info', '/download/agent.py']: try: r = urllib.request.urlopen\(f'https://127.0.0.1:8444{path}', context=ctx\) print\(path, '->', r.status\) except Exception as e: print\(path, '-> ERROR:', e\) ")
